{{Infobox event
|name=Alice is mistaken for the Rabbit's housemaid and agrees to retrieve the missing items from his house
|participants=Alice
|chapitre=4
}}

== Course of events ==

Alice becomes mistaken for the Rabbit's housemaid while trapped in his small room, with her arms and legs extending through the window and chimney. In response to this mistaken identity, she agrees to retrieve the missing items from his house.

The situation then develops as the Rabbit and his servants attempt to extract Alice from the window. Resisting their efforts, Alice kicks Bill down the chimney. At the same time, pebbles thrown through the window undergo a miraculous transformation, becoming cakes. Alice eats these cakes, an action that causes her to shrink back to her small size.

== References ==

- Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

[[Category:Événements]]
